diff:
diff --git a/src/preferences.py b/src/preferences.py
index deba08a..7fccd0b 100644
--- a/src/preferences.py
+++ b/src/preferences.py
@@ -1,10 +1,24 @@
 def merge_preferences(defaults: dict, overrides: dict) -> dict:
+    # Make a shallow copy of defaults first
     merged = defaults.copy()
+
+    # Ensure nested structures are duplicated so that defaults are not mutated
+    if "notifications" in merged and isinstance(merged["notifications"], dict):
+        merged["notifications"] = merged["notifications"].copy()
+    if "tags" in merged and isinstance(merged["tags"], list):
+        merged["tags"] = merged["tags"][:]
+
+    # Merge notifications
     notifications = merged.setdefault("notifications", {})
     notifications.update(overrides.get("notifications", {}))
+
+    # Merge tags
     tags = merged.setdefault("tags", [])
     tags.extend(overrides.get("tags", []))
+
+    # Merge other keys
     for key, value in overrides.items():
         if key not in {"notifications", "tags"}:
             merged[key] = value
+
     return merged
